Mentions Timeline (2 articles)
3303-06-09
Galactic News Conflict in Jotunheim Draws to a Close
The Revolutionary Jotunheim Resistance successfully drove the Autocracy of Jotunheim from the system, with significant material support from Jasmina Halsey.
3303-06-02
Community Goal The Battle for Jotunheim
The Autocracy of Jotunheim has entered the Jotunheim system to bring it under Imperial control, opposed by the Revolutionary Jotunheim Resistance, while Jasmina Halsey supports the resistance with material aid.
